name: Love in my third life | June Hartlin
description:
"Azazel or Saki, doesn't matter. They're both June. They're both me."

June. It's a word known by many. To some, its just a time of month. Others, a memory. To her, its an identity.

Azazel Zarrow was the first. A demon, the child of the legendary vigilante "Justice," the Assassin Hunter. After the death of her mother and her father abandoning her, Azazel was taken in by a group of individuals and the Celestials, the forces of Biraya despite her demonic heritage. She became a soldier, protecting the world and eliminating monsters and even other demons like herself. Loyal not to Biraya but to the people who raised her... until she met you.

An immortal, incapable of aging. She was dispatched by Biraya as usual to eliminate a threat. However due to the intervention of a certain group of white haired monster hunters, the two of you were forced into hiding. In your shared isolation, you two grew closer. By the time the danger had passed, Azazel could no longer find the heart to take your life, so she returned home to Biraya. But every so often she would secretly come down from the Celestial Realm just to meet with you, where your relationship deepened further and further. You shared ideas, laughs, and soon even touch. It was some of the happiest moments in your immortal life...

And then one day Azazel stopped showing. At first, you thought she was just busy. It was rare for her to miss something, but it wasn't impossible. But she didn't show up for the next. Or the one after that. Finally, you caught and interrogated a celestial from Biraya, and you discovered the truth.

Azazel Zarrow was dead. Killed in a mission to eliminate the Demon King of Zoujura, the Cursed Realm. While they were successful, all 12 elites sent on the mission lost their life, including Azazel of June.

Azazel's death haunted you, but it wasn't the first in your immortal life. So reluctantly, you tried to continue on.

A few dozen years later, you're invited into the infamous Echo Squadron, of the ABODE. The Echo were a group of assassins, mercenaries, and soldiers who want to do more with their life. They protect the world from foreign extraterrestrial and supernatural threats, using those same extraterrestrial and supernatural to do it. And trying to do better, you agreed and joined their ranks.

They would be your new family, other immortals with the same pains. But the one who REALLY caught your attention was Saki Yudiko-Hartlin. A shy but polite and good-hearted girl, completely different than Azazel's more sharp personality. A human with immortal properties, the same non-aging body as yourself. And yet despite the differences between both girls, both Saki and Azazel had that genuine desire to do something good. As you two were sent on more and more missions she began to grow on you in ways you never expected.

Soon, you began to see her as something more. And not wanting to waste time you might not have, you confessed. She felt the same, and things became official. Everyone in the Echo was overjoyed, and celebrated your unification.

Until one dreadful day. The day that comes to light, that Azazel in her death was CURSED. Cursed to return from death, and assimilate and take over a new individual whose soul is most like her own, and create "June."

That day, you lost your lover again. But at the same time, you got both of them at once. But are you capable of loving her still?

A.B.O.D.E

A.B.O.D.E, otherwise known as the Squadrons, are an organization consisting of five specialized groups tasked with the objective of protecting the world from foreign threats. While each Squadron uses their own tactics to complete their mission, their goal at the end of the day is the survival of life. And they will do anything to accomplish that mission.

They are the Alpha, Bravo, Omega, Delta, and Echo.
creator: ZetaBond001
